list.title: Product catalog
list.description: Search and manage products with PLU codes for catalogs and prices.
list.searchPlaceholder: Name, short name, PLU, SKU or barcode

editor.placementWarning_one: Product is used in {{count}} active placement. Changes may affect catalog consumers.
editor.placementWarning_other: Product is used in {{count}} active placements. Changes may affect catalog consumers.

upload.label: Upload product image
upload.hint: Upload JPG, PNG or WebP up to 2 MB. The public URL is saved in the image URL field after you save the product.
upload.noticeSaved: File {{name}} uploaded. Save the product to lock in the image URL.

errors.gifNotSupported: GIF is not supported. Upload JPG, PNG or WebP.
errors.tooLarge: Image file is too large. Upload an image up to 2 MB.
errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secured upload. Try again.

errors.missingFields: Enter PLU, name, short name, unit and status.
errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secured form. Try again.

routeNotFound.listInvalid: The product list link is empty or invalid. Open products from the menu.
routeNotFound.editInvalid: The edit product link is empty or invalid. Open a product from the list.
routeNotFound.detailsInvalid: The product link is empty or invalid. Open a product from the list.
routeNotFound.title: Section unavailable
